description: Scrapes LinkedIn profile data for lead enrichment and activity tracking

input.extendOutputFunction: async ({ page, request, $ }) => { return { connectionStatus: await page.$eval('.pvs-profile-actions .pvs-profile-actions__action:first-child button span', el => el.textContent?.trim()).catch(() => null) }; }

scheduleNote: Configure in n8n to run every 30 minutes with leads that need LinkedIn tracking
